name: feature.comments.agents
description: Comments feature agent pack (ADR 0014/0021) — a reviewer agent that reads a CMS page / KB collection and posts review comments via feature.comments.nodes. Tool-allowlisted to feature.comments.nodes only; it posts comments (which notify a human over the existing inbox), it does not edit the resource.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Content Reviewer
agents.description: Reviews a CMS page or KB collection and posts review comments (clarity, accuracy, gaps) via feature.comments.nodes.post, so a human is notified of the review over the existing inbox. Reads the existing thread first to avoid duplicate notes. Posts comments only — it does NOT edit the resource (no resource-write tool in its allowlist, by design).
